title: Moving to Noah Real Estate's Smart City Apartments: Elevator Clearances and Moving Day Procedures
excerpt: Noah Real Estate smart city apartments: elevator clearances, moving day procedures, freight booking, condo relocation Addis premium developer guide.
content:
Moving to Noah Real Estate's smart city apartments: elevator clearances and moving day procedures

Noah Real Estate smart city apartments combine digital building ops with strict elevator clearances—sofa diagonal that fit old building may fail freight door by three centimeters. Moving day procedures are management-scripted: deposit, pad, time slot, and crew count before truck leaves depot.

This guide covers elevator clearances and moving procedures for Noah Real Estate smart city apartments.

Elevator clearance essentials

  • Measure freight door width height depth—not passenger elevator assumption.
  • Diagonal longest furniture versus cabin interior diagram.
  • Weight limit per trip—split king mattress loads.
  • Prohibited items rooftop AC units management install only sometimes.
  • Reservation fee and forfeiture if no-show slot.

Moving day procedure sequence

Security pre-register plate; lobby runner layout; elevator pad lock; two trips max lobby dwell if policy; damage walk after; deposit return inspection; fob activation confirm.

Smart building integration

Visitor QR codes crew; app notification neighbors move window; CCTV documented—professional behavior only.

Pre-move survey

Active Movers on-site measure recommended large pieces; hoist contingency priced before contract; disassembly included quote line.

Active Movers Noah developments

Developer liaison familiarity; elevator pad kits stock; clearance worksheet client sign.

Conclusion

Noah smart city apartment moves succeed when elevator clearance surveyed early and moving day procedure followed minute-by-minute—not surprise at freight door.
author: Active Movers Team
